= IKE Tooling — Third-Party Notices
:icons: font
:source-highlighter: coderay
:toc: preamble
:toclevels: 3

This page is the curated companion to two mechanical inventories
that ship alongside it:

* link:bom.json[Software Bill of Materials (CycloneDX, JSON)] —
  full transitive dependency graph with SPDX-normalized licenses
  and artifact hashes. Ingestible by Dependency-Track, Trivy,
  Snyk, GitHub's dependency graph, etc. Also reachable as a Maven
  artifact with `<classifier>cyclonedx</classifier>`.
* link:dependencies.html[Maven dependencies report] — auto-generated
  HTML browse of declared dependencies, with verbatim per-license
  text from each dependency's POM. License names appear here as
  declared in the upstream POM (often noisy: "Apache 2.0" vs.
  "The Apache Software License, Version 2.0"); the SBOM normalizes
  these to canonical SPDX identifiers.

The curated content below covers what neither sees — Maven core
machinery, plugins, the Maven Site skin, build-time signing — that
the mechanical reports either don't reach or under-report. License
identifiers below are SPDX form (`Apache-2.0`, `MIT`, `EPL-2.0`,
expressions with `OR` / `AND` / `WITH`) so they're unambiguous and
grep-friendly.

For the corresponding notices in the rest of the IKE platform see:

* `link:../ike-docs/THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.html[ike-docs]` — AsciiDoc
  rendering chain, fonts, DocBook, frontend assets.
* `link:../ike-platform/THIRD_PARTY_NOTICES.html[ike-platform]` —
  Java toolchain, BOM-managed dependencies, test framework.

== Maven build infrastructure

|===
| Component | License | Role

| https://maven.apache.org/[Apache Maven] (core, build extensions, plugin API)
| `Apache-2.0`
| Build orchestration. `ike-tooling` consumes `maven-api-core`,
  `maven-api-plugin`, `maven-api-impl`, `maven-plugin-tools-annotations`,
  and the standard build lifecycle plugins.

| https://maven.apache.org/plugins/maven-site-plugin/[Maven Site Plugin]
| `Apache-2.0`
| Generates the project Maven Site (this site).

| https://maven.apache.org/plugins/maven-project-info-reports-plugin/[Maven Project Info Reports Plugin]
| `Apache-2.0`
| Produces `licenses.html`, `dependencies.html`, `plugin-management.html`,
  `dependency-management.html`, and the rest of the standard reports
  visible on the left navigation.

| https://maven.apache.org/plugins/maven-dependency-plugin/[Maven Dependency Plugin]
| `Apache-2.0`
| Unpacks classified ZIP artifacts (`claude`, `site-theme`,
  `asciidoctorconfig`, `scaffold`) into consumer build directories.

| https://maven.apache.org/plugins/maven-assembly-plugin/[Maven Assembly Plugin]
| `Apache-2.0`
| Builds the classified ZIP artifacts produced by `ike-build-standards`.

| https://maven.apache.org/plugins/maven-compiler-plugin/[Maven Compiler Plugin],
  https://maven.apache.org/surefire/maven-surefire-plugin/[Surefire],
  https://maven.apache.org/plugins/maven-jar-plugin/[Jar Plugin],
  https://maven.apache.org/plugins/maven-resources-plugin/[Resources],
  https://maven.apache.org/plugins/maven-install-plugin/[Install],
  https://maven.apache.org/plugins/maven-deploy-plugin/[Deploy],
  https://maven.apache.org/plugins/maven-clean-plugin/[Clean]
| `Apache-2.0`
| Standard Maven lifecycle plugins.

| https://maven.apache.org/plugins/maven-source-plugin/[Maven Source Plugin],
  https://maven.apache.org/plugins/maven-javadoc-plugin/[Javadoc Plugin]
| `Apache-2.0`
| Source jar and javadoc generation during release.

| https://maven.apache.org/plugins/maven-gpg-plugin/[Maven GPG Plugin]
| `Apache-2.0`
| Signs release artifacts. Configured to use the `bc` (Bouncy Castle)
  signer for parallel-safe signing without `gpg-agent` contention.

| https://github.com/CycloneDX/cyclonedx-maven-plugin[CycloneDX Maven Plugin]
| `Apache-2.0`
| Generates the SBOM linked at the top of this page (`bom.json`,
  `bom.xml`). See ike-issues#333.
|===

== Maven Site skin

|===
| Component | License | Role

| https://github.com/sentrysoftware/maven-skins[Sentry Maven Skin]
| `Apache-2.0`
| The Maven Site skin applied to every published page. Provides the
  base navigation chrome (header, sidebar, breadcrumbs). The IKE
  Forest theme overlays Sentry's defaults via the `site-theme`
  classifier produced by `ike-build-standards` (see #318).

| https://github.com/sentrysoftware/maven-skins/tree/main/maven-skin-tools[Maven Skin Tools]
| `Apache-2.0`
| Velocity helper context (`$headElement`, `$bodyElement`) used by
  the Sentry skin. Pulled in as a `maven-site-plugin` dependency.

| https://www.graalvm.org/[GraalVM Polyglot, GraalVM JS]
| `GPL-2.0-only WITH Classpath-exception-2.0` (Community Edition)
| Replaces the deprecated Nashorn engine for skin script evaluation.
  Pulled in as a `maven-site-plugin` dependency.

| https://prismjs.com/[Prism]
| `MIT`
| Syntax highlighter shipped in rendered HTML. Used by the AsciiDoc
  pipeline; per-language CSS is bundled in the rendered output.
|===

== Cryptographic signing

|===
| Component | License | Role

| https://www.bouncycastle.org/[Bouncy Castle (`bcprov-jdk18on`, `bcpg-jdk18on`)]
| `MIT` (Bouncy Castle distributes under an MIT-X11 adaptation; SPDX classifies as `MIT`)
| OpenPGP signing engine used by `maven-gpg-plugin`'s `bc` signer.
  IKE releases consistently use `bc` because the native `gpg` signer
  serializes through `gpg-agent` and breaks parallel reactor builds.
|===

== Test frameworks

|===
| Component | License | Role

| https://junit.org/junit5/[JUnit 5 (Jupiter, Platform)]
| `EPL-2.0`
| Unit test framework.

| https://assertj.github.io/[AssertJ]
| `Apache-2.0`
| Fluent assertion library used in tests.

| https://site.mockito.org/[Mockito]
| `MIT`
| Mocking framework used in `ike-workspace-model` tests.
|===

== Documentation tooling consumed during plugin development

The ike-tooling reactor itself does not render AsciiDoc to PDF or
HTML — that work belongs to `ike-docs`. The Maven Site of this
reactor consumes:

|===
| Component | License | Role

| https://github.com/asciidoctor/asciidoctor-doxia[Asciidoctor Parser Doxia Module]
| `MIT`
| Lets `maven-site-plugin` render the `src/site/asciidoc/*.adoc`
  files (this page among them) as part of `site:site`.

| https://www.jruby.org/[JRuby]
| `EPL-2.0 OR GPL-2.0-only OR LGPL-2.1-only`
| Embedded Ruby runtime that the AsciiDoc parser uses. Pulled in
  transitively by the Doxia module. The `OR` is consumer's choice —
  for downstream users including IKE, EPL-2.0 is the most
  redistribution-friendly of the three.
|===

== Verification

* `mvn package` produces `target/bom.json` and `target/bom.xml`
  (CycloneDX 1.6 format) with SPDX-normalized licenses. Validate
  with `cyclonedx-cli validate --input-file target/bom.json` or
  ingest into Dependency-Track.
* `mvn site` populates `target/site/licenses.html`,
  `target/site/dependencies.html`, `target/site/plugins.html`, and
  `target/site/plugin-management.html` from declared
  `<dependencies>`, `<build><plugins>`, and `<build><pluginManagement>`.
* The same `mvn site` run copies `bom.json` and `bom.xml` into
  `target/site/` so they're reachable from the published Maven Site.
* This curated document complements those mechanical inventories.
  Issues or omissions: file an issue at
  https://github.com/IKE-Network/ike-issues.
